name: Python 3
updateContentCommand: [ -f packages.txt ] && sudo apt-get update && sudo xargs -r apt-get install -y < packages.txt; [ -f requirements.txt ] && pip3 install --user -r requirements.txt; python3 -m compileall . && python3 -c "import api,app,data,sec_refresh,sqlalchemy,aiohttp,yfinance"; echo '✅ Environment ready: deps installed and startup validation passed'
